samples.speech: I'm going to rest on the couch for a bit—let me know if you need anything, I'll be right here.
I'm resting—I'm content. If anyone needs anything, tell me now or I'll handle it in the morning.
Hey crew, I brought snacks — someone start the playlist, and if the dishes magically do themselves, I’ll take full credit.
I’m going to make a big pot of chamomile—who wants a cup and a chat while I’m at it? Take a seat; I’ve got time.
(pours a drink, raises glass) To everyone who stayed—and to those we couldn't save, I'm sorry; we did what we thought was necessary.
(voice steady, jaw tight) Alright — enough with the whispers. If there’s an official update, management will tell us; until then we focus on our projects and not on rumors.
I'll pull the latest numbers and confirm with HR—no one needs to start panicking; I'll update everyone by 4pm.
Alright cool—budget cuts, layoffs, yada yada—guess I'll start rehearsing my "unemployed DJ" set tonight, but if they try to toss anyone out quietly, they picked the wrong

(voice steady but hands shaking) [NAME], can we step outside for a minute? I need you to tell me there’s something—anything—we can do about this.
[NAME] closes his laptop, voice steady but tight: "Sit down—send me the list of affected roles and transition plans within the hour.
(quiet, controlled) [NAME], I need you to be honest—what did you hear about the cuts? My stomach's in knots and I can't protect everyone if I'm kept in the dark.
